hero.title: Ruan Moraes
hero.descriptionSimple: Trainee Developer at CAPYS, with experience in backend and frontend. Focused on delivering quality solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Software Developer with backend and frontend experience

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.description: Software Developer with over 2 years of experience and studies in the technology field. Solid performance in backend and frontend development, including bug fixes, implementation of new features, SQL query optimization, and technical support for teams. I have a solid foundation in software architecture best practices, clean code, and pattern-driven development.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.paragraph1: My journey with technology started early, at age 8, with the curiosity to understand how computers worked. At 12, I had my first contact with programming through Python. Influenced by friends, I also became interested in hardware, which naturally led me to deepen my interest in the world of technology even further.
journey.paragraph2: After building my own computer and diving deep into hardware, I decided to pursue a career in development. Today, I work as a Trainee Developer at CAPYS, where I apply my knowledge in C#, .NET, React, React Native, SQL Server, and databases to deliver quality solutions.

career.title: Career Path
career.subtitle: The main milestones of my professional journey

firstContact.title: First Contact with Technology
firstContact.description: At age 8, I started exploring computers watching Minecraft videos, sparking my curiosity about the digital world.

programming.title: Started Programming
programming.description: At 12, I had my first contact with Python through Gustavo Guanabara's course. My interest in hardware also grew.

ownComputer.title: Built My Own PC
ownComputer.description: I built my first computer with a Xeon E5-2650v2 and GTX 1660TI, consolidating my hardware knowledge.

university.title: Started University
university.description: Began my Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering at Uninter, formalizing my career in technology.

firstJob.title: Trainee Developer @ CAPYS
firstJob.description: My first professional opportunity, working with C#, .Net, React and databases in a real development environment.

future.title: Next Steps
future.description: Continue evolving as a developer, contribute to challenging projects and explore new technologies.
